title: ixeris lyrata
intro: Ixeris lyrata, also known as the Chinese winged thistle or winged prickly lettuce, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ixeris lyrata are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to wounds.
